What you get

A PDF decision snapshot backed by official public records.

No subscription. No dashboard. No monthly minimum.

See the PermitPulse Preview Pack
01 / SNAPSHOT

Decision Snapshot

Plain-English read on one address, built for the next decision.

02 / SOURCES

Official Source Checklist

Which public sources were checked and which ones still need a manual pull.

03 / LOG

PermitPulse Research Log

Searches, portals, dates, source notes, and access limits in one place.

04 / CHECKED

What We Checked

Permit history, parcel clues, scope, status, finals, and obvious mismatches.

05 / FOUND

What We Found

Clear record signals, gaps, and risk notes from available public records.

06 / CONFIRM

What Needs Manual Confirmation

Items to verify with the city, owner, professional, or source office.

07 / MOVE

Recommended Next Move

What to ask, request, confirm, or pause before committing.

08 / EVIDENCE

Evidence Pack

Screenshots, links, and official-source references where available.

Best for

When one address needs a real answer.

✓ Buying or leasing a property

✓ Verifying remodel or addition history

✓ Checking permit risk before design or construction

✓ Figuring out the right next permit step

How it works

Fast, direct, address-first.

✓ Send the address

✓ We review the public permit record and timeline

✓ You get a clear written summary with the next step

Real-world use case

The kind of issue this is built to catch.

Example: before moving forward on a triplex, the permit record shows an old addition, unclear final sign-off, and a scope mismatch. That does not automatically kill the deal, but it tells you what to verify before spending more money.

USE CASE

Unclear final sign-off

USE CASE

Scope mismatch

USE CASE

Next question to ask before moving forward

Request Express Review

PermitPulse also tracks public-record signals through the Red Tape Index, Radar, and Top Permits pages. See the sample report or who it helps.

PermitPulse is a first-pass public-record review. It is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, code determination, permit expeditor service, or permit approval guarantee.

Offers

No software rollout. Just one clean decision snapshot.

No subscription. No dashboard. No monthly minimum.

Permit Review Plus
$149

No subscription. No dashboard. No monthly minimum. Just a clean PDF decision snapshot backed by official public records.

PermitPulse is not full permit management software and not a permit expeditor. It is a fast first-pass public-record intelligence report for people who need permit clarity before they buy, bid, build, list, or quote.

  • Decision Snapshot
  • Official Source Checklist
  • PermitPulse Research Log
  • What We Checked and What We Found
  • What Needs Manual Confirmation
  • Recommended Next Move
  • Evidence Pack where available

Target delivery is 24 to 48 business hours after the address and notes are received.

Express Permit Review Plus

Express Permit Review Plus is $300 when available.

Target turnaround is 4 business hours or less when scheduling and source access allow.

Express availability depends on request time, property complexity, source availability, and public portal access. This is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, or permit approval guarantee.

PermitPulse Gold Desk

For operators who do not want to guess.

Founding seats start at $499/mo.

Gold Desk is a private monthly permit intelligence and workflow support desk for permit-heavy operators. It is built for expeditors, ADU contractors, builders, property managers, investors, and real estate operators who want faster answers, cleaner follow-ups, and better systems around permits, projects, clients, and documents.

✓ Priority permit/property research

✓ Intake and follow-up cleanup

✓ Client update templates

✓ CRM, spreadsheet, or dashboard improvements

✓ Automation support

✓ Monthly systems upgrades

✓ Founding member number

✓ Gold Desk member kit after the first paid month

Founding seats are limited while this remains hands-on.

Ask About Gold Desk
Coverage note

LA is the strongest market today.

Public permit data quality varies by city. Los Angeles is the deepest market today. Selected live support is also available in Pasadena, Santa Monica, and San Jose.

One Address

Have an address you’re unsure about?

Start with the quick $149 Permit Review Plus. Send the address, share what you’re trying to figure out, and get a clear written read before your next call, offer, filing, or site visit.
